segments.text: BREDA: Hello, Wayside Camera Club, Breda speaking.
segments.translation: 布兰达：您好。路旁摄影俱乐部，我是布兰达。

segments.text: DAN: Oh, hello, um, my name's Dan and I'd like to join your club.
segments.translation: 丹：您好。我是丹。我想要加入你们的俱乐部。

segments.text: BREDA: That's great, Dan.
segments.translation: 布兰达：太好了，丹。

segments.text: We have an application form - would you like to complete it over the phone, then you can ask any questions you might have?
segments.translation: 我们有一份申请表。咱们现在边通话边填写，然后有任何问题您可以问，这样可以吗？

segments.text: DAN: Oh, yes, thanks.
segments.translation: 丹：可以的。谢谢。

segments.text: BREDA: OK, so what's your family name?
segments.translation: 布兰达：好的。您的姓氏是？

segments.text: DAN: It's Green - Dan Green.
segments.translation: 丹：格林。我叫丹·格林。

segments.text: BREDA: So - can I take your email address?
segments.translation: 布兰达：方便告诉我您的邮箱吗？

segments.text: DAN: Yes, it's dan1068@market.com.
segments.translation: 丹：没问题，邮箱地址是dan1068@market.com。

segments.text: BREDA: Thanks. And what about your home address?
segments.translation: 布兰达：谢谢。您的住址是？

segments.text: DAN: Well, I'm about ten miles away from your club in Peacetown.
segments.translation: 丹：我住在平安镇，距离你们的俱乐部约10英里。

segments.text: I live in a house there.
segments.translation: 我住在那的一所房子里。

segments.text: BREDA: OK, so what's the house number and street?
segments.translation: 布兰达：好的。房子在哪条街？编号是？

segments.text: DAN: It's 52 Marrowfield Street.
segments.translation: 丹：马洛菲尔德街，52号。

segments.text: BREDA: Is that M-A double R-O-W-F-I-E-L-D?
segments.translation: 布兰达：是写作M-A-R-R-O-W-F-I-E-L-D吗？

segments.text: DAN: That's right.
segments.translation: 丹：没错。

segments.text: BREDA: … and that's Peacetown, you said?
segments.translation: 布兰达：您刚才说是在平安镇对吗？

segments.text: DAN: Uhuh.
segments.translation: 丹：嗯。

segments.text: BREDA: So how did you hear about our club?
segments.translation: 布兰达：您是怎么知道我们的俱乐部的？

segments.text: Did you look on the internet?
segments.translation: 是在网上看到的吗？

segments.text: DAN: I usually do that, but this time, well, I was talking to a relative the other day and he suggested it.
segments.translation: 丹：我经常上网，但是这次不是。有一天我和亲戚说话，他推荐你们的俱乐部。

segments.text: BREDA: Oh, is he a member too?
segments.translation: 布兰达：他也是我们的会员吗？

segments.text: DAN: He belongs to another club - but he'd heard good things about yours.
segments.translation: 丹：他在另一个俱乐部，但是他听说你们这里很好。

segments.text: BREDA: OK. So what do you hope to get from joining?
segments.translation: 布兰达：明白了。您加入俱乐部的目的是？

segments.text: DAN: Well, one thing that really interests me is the competitions that you have.
segments.translation: 丹：我对你们这里的比赛真的很感兴趣。

segments.text: I enjoy entering those.
segments.translation: 我喜欢参加比赛。

segments.text: BREDA: Right. Anything else?
segments.translation: 布兰达：好的，还有其它原因吗？

segments.text: DAN: Well, I also like to socialise with other photographers.
segments.translation: 丹：我还喜欢和其它摄影师交流。

segments.text: BREDA: That's great. So what type of membership would you like?
segments.translation: 布兰达：很好。您想要办理哪一类会员？

segments.text: DAN: What are the options?
segments.translation: 丹：有哪些选择？

segments.text: BREDA: It's £30 a year for full membership or £20 a year if you're an associate.
segments.translation: 布兰达：正式会员每年30英镑，非正式会员每年20英镑。

segments.text: DAN: I think I'll go for the full membership, then.
segments.translation: 丹：我想我会选正式会员。

segments.text: BREDA: That's a good idea because you can't vote in meetings with an associate membership.
segments.translation: 布兰达：很好的选择，因为非正式会员在会议中不能投票。

segments.text: BREDA: If I could just find out a bit more about you …
segments.translation: 布兰达：可以再问一些关于您的问题吗？

segments.text: DAN: OK.
segments.translation: 丹：好的。

segments.text: BREDA: So you said you wanted to compete - have you ever won any photography competitions?
segments.translation: 布兰达：您刚才说想要参加比赛，您曾经在摄影比赛中得过任何奖项吗？

segments.text: DAN: Not yet, but I have entered three in the past.
segments.translation: 丹：没有。但是我之前参加了三次比赛。

segments.text: BREDA: Oh, that's interesting.
segments.translation: 布兰达：哦，听起来很有趣。

segments.text: So why don't you tell me something about those?
segments.translation: 您不妨告诉我一些关于比赛的事儿。

segments.text: Let's start with the first one.
segments.translation: 我们先聊下第一次比赛吧。

segments.text: DAN: Well, the theme was entitled 'Domestic Life'.
segments.translation: 丹：比赛的主题是“家庭生活”。

segments.text: BREDA: I see - so it had to be something related to the home?
segments.translation: 布兰达：明白了。所以参赛作品是和家庭有关对吗？

segments.text: DAN: Yeah. I chose to take a photo of a family sitting round the dinner table having a meal, and, um, I didn't win, but I did get some feedback.
segments.translation: 丹：是的。我选择拍一张一家人围坐在餐桌旁吃饭的照片，嗯，我没有得奖，但我确实得到了一些反馈。

segments.text: BREDA: Oh, what did the judges say?
segments.translation: 布兰达：嗯，评审们怎么说？

segments.text: DAN: That it was too 'busy' as a picture.
segments.translation: 丹：图片看起来太“杂乱”了。

segments.text: BREDA: Aha - so it was the composition of the picture that they criticised?
segments.translation: 布兰达：啊哈，所以他们批评的是画面的构图？

segments.text: DAN: That's right - and once they'd told me that, I could see my mistake.
segments.translation: 丹：没错。他们一告诉我，我就明白我的错误了。

segments.text: BREDA: So what was the theme of the second competition?
segments.translation: 布兰达：第二次比赛的主题是什么？

segments.text: DAN: Well, my university was on the coast and that area gets a lot of beautiful sunsets, so that was the theme.
segments.translation: 丹：我的大学在海边，那个地区有很多美丽的日落，所以这就是主题。

segments.text: BREDA: Oh, sunsets, that's a great theme.
segments.translation: 布兰达：哦，日落，是个好的主题。

segments.text: DAN: Yes. The instructions were to capture the clouds as well - it couldn't just be blue sky and a setting sun.
segments.translation: 丹：没错。赛事说明还要捕捉云彩的图片，不能只有蓝天和落日。

segments.text: BREDA: Sure, cause they give you all those amazing pinks and purples.
segments.translation: 布兰达：的确。因为云彩能呈现出粉色和紫色，非常漂亮。

segments.text: DAN: Yeah - and I thought I'd done that well, but the feedback was that I should have waited a bit longer to get the shot.
segments.translation: 丹：是的。我认为我做得很好，但反馈是我应该多等一会儿再拍摄。

segments.text: BREDA: I see. So the timing wasn't right.
segments.translation: 布兰达：明白了，拍摄的时机不对。

segments.text: DAN: Yes - I took it too soon, basically.
segments.translation: 丹：是的，就是说我拍得太早了。

segments.text: And then the third competition I entered was called 'Animal Magic'.
segments.translation: 我参加的第三场比赛叫做“动物魔法”。

segments.text: BREDA: Well, that's a difficult subject!
segments.translation: 布兰达：好吧，这个主题可不简单。

segments.text: DAN: I know! I had to take hundreds of shots.
segments.translation: 丹：就是说。我拍了有上百张。

segments.text: BREDA: I'm sure - because animals move all the time.
segments.translation: 布兰达：肯定的。因为动物一直在动。

segments.text: DAN: That's what we had to show - there had to be some movement in the scene.
segments.translation: 丹：这就是我们必须展示的，场景中必须有一些运动。

segments.text: I got a great shot of a fox in the end, but I took it at night and, well, I suspected that it was a bit dark, which is what I was told.
segments.translation: 最后我拍了一张很棒的狐狸的照片，但我是在晚上拍的，好吧，我怀疑它有点暗，他们是这么告诉我的。

segments.text: BREDA: Well Dan - you seem to be really keen and we'd be delighted to have you in our club.
segments.translation: 布兰达：好的，丹。您看起来真的很喜欢摄影，我们也很高兴您能够加入我们。

segments.text: I'm sure we can help with all those areas that you've outlined.
segments.translation: 我相信我们可以为您提到的所有这些方面提供帮助。

segments.text: DAN: Thanks, that's great.
segments.translation: 丹：非常感谢，太好了。
